intellij-2024.3.3.patch

I tried working on the patch to update it to 2024.3.3 and it launches but gets stuck and i see nothing. I also pet'd port{clippy,fmt,lint}. My patch is based on attachment #257847. I am not an user of java/intellij but wanted to help. Thanks in advance.
